/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/liblexilla.a CMakeFiles/lexilla.dir/src/Lexilla.cxx.o CMakeFiles/lexilla.dir/lexlib/Accessor.cxx.o CMakeFiles/lexilla.dir/lexlib/CharacterCategory.cxx.o CMakeFiles/lexilla.dir/lexers/LexZig.cxx.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/liblexilla.a
